diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -61,7 +61,7 @@
                 best_unvisited_action = first_step

                 

         if u > 0:

-            score = u * np.exp(-0.1 * dist)

+            score = u * np.exp(-0.15 * dist)

             if score > best_score:

                 best_score = score

                 best_action = first_step

@@ -142,15 +142,15 @@
     travel_distance = np.mean(successful_distances) if successful_distances else 0.0

     

     for env_type, data in per_type.items():

+        data["success_rate"] = np.mean(data["success"])

         data["explored_rate"] = np.mean(data["explored_rate"])

-        data["success_rate"] = np.mean(data["success"])

         data["travel_distance"] = np.mean(data["travel_distance"]) if data["travel_distance"] else 0.0

         del data["success"]

         

     output_data = {

         "per_episode": results,

         "total_episodes": total_episodes
